backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor file serving as a placeholder backend entry point.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features for Binance Futures API integration, universe filtering, volume parsing, logging, and UI components with associated test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files covering types, services (Binance API, RSI calculation, universe filtering, entry gates, risk management, exit evaluation), Zustand store, engine loop, utilities, and UI components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the G100 RSI 3TF Paper Engine application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with ErrorBoundary wrapper, tabbed navigation (TOP5, TRADES, STATS, LOGS), header, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches UI crashes, displays error details with stack trace, and provides a reset button to clear localStorage and reload the page.
frontend/src/components/LogsTab.tsx: Logs tab component displaying timestamped engine events in a scrollable area with color-coded event types (red for failures, yellow for warnings, blue/green for info) and JSON payload rendering.
frontend/src/components/StatsTab.tsx: Statistics dashboard displaying trading metrics in a grid layout including total trades, win rate, average win/loss, expectancy, profit factor, max drawdown, and current equity using Card components.
frontend/src/components/SymbolCard.tsx: Displays a trading symbol card with RSI indicators (15m, 5m, 1m), entry/stop-loss/take-profit prices, gate status checks, and position status badges (IDLE, OPEN, COOLDOWN, SIGNAL_READY).
frontend/src/components/Top5Tab.tsx: Main dashboard tab showing engine controls (start/stop/reset), equity display, and a grid of SymbolCard components for top 5 symbols plus open positions.
frontend/src/components/TradesTab.tsx: Displays a filterable table of closed trades with time/symbol filters and CSV/JSON export functionality, showing entry/exit prices, PnL, duration, and exit reasons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, handling authentication state changes and invalidating dependent queries when the actor updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and status tracking (initializing, idle, logging-in, success, error).
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components like backgrounds, borders, primary/secondary colors, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/services/binanceApi.ts: Binance Futures API service providing functions to fetch 24h ticker data for universe selection and kline/candlestick data for multiple timeframes (1m, 5m, 15m) using safeFetch transport.
frontend/src/services/engineLoop.ts: Main trading engine loop that refreshes TOP5 symbols every 15 minutes, fetches 1m klines for watched symbols, calculates RSI across multiple timeframes, evaluates entry gates for new positions, and manages exits for open positions with cooldown logic.
frontend/src/services/entryGates.ts: Evaluates three entry gate conditions (15m RSI between 55-70, 5m RSI above 50, and 1m RSI crossing above 45) and returns whether all gates pass for trade entry.
frontend/src/services/exitEvaluator.ts: Evaluates exit conditions for open positions (stop-loss, TP1 flag, TP2, and 45-minute time stop), calculates PnL, and creates trade records with exit details.
frontend/src/services/riskManager.ts: Calculates position sizing based on 1% equity risk with 0.6% stop-loss distance, 5x leverage, and validates against constraints (max 2 positions, 90% margin limit, cooldowns).
frontend/src/services/rsiCalculator.ts: Calculates RSI using Wilder's smoothing method with a configurable period (default 27), handling edge cases for zero gains/losses.
frontend/src/services/universeFilter.ts: Filters Binance Futures USDT-M perpetuals by excluding stablecoins, majors, and low-volume pairs (min 5M), then selects top 5 by quote volume with fallback logic if filtering produces empty results.
frontend/src/store/engineStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence managing engine state (equity, positions, trades, logs, cooldowns, TOP5 symbols, RSI cache) and actions for starting/stopping engine, updating state, and calculating statistics.
frontend/src/types/binance.ts: TypeScript type definitions for Binance API responses including exchange info, 24hr tickers, and kline data structures (raw and parsed).
frontend/src/types/store.ts: TypeScript type definitions for store state including Position, Trade, Stats, LogEntry with event types, RSICache, ClosedCandle, and the complete EngineStore interface.
frontend/src/utils/delay.ts: Simple async delay utility function that returns a Promise resolving after specified milliseconds.
frontend/src/utils/exportTrades.ts: Exports trade history to CSV or JSON files with timestamped filenames, formatting trade data and triggering browser downloads.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Provides utility functions for formatting numbers, currency, percentages, timestamps, and durations with safe handling of undefined/invalid values.
frontend/src/utils/safeFetch.ts: Implements a fetch wrapper with 5s timeout, 2 retries with 500ms delay, error logging to engineStore, and returns null on final failure instead of throwing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme for sidebar/chart/card components, accordion animations, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a LONG-only RSI paper trading bot for Binance USDT-M futures with closed-candle logic, Zustand persistence, mobile-first UI, and comprehensive architectural notes on deterministic state management and error handling.
